title: It's Christmas Spray and Sparkle Glitter Gold 200ml
features: Sensational Glitter Spray and Sparkle, sutiable for Christmas Trees and Decorations
This Glitter is avaliable in 2 colours and ideal for providing a Sparkle finish to your festive decorations
Spray Outdoors in a well ventilated area.
description: With this sensational glitter, you will be able to achieve the look of your dreams. This glitter is avaliable in 2 colours and will provide a sparkling glitter finish wherever you desire. This Spray and Sparkle Glitter is ideal for adding festive shimmer to your Christmas tree and decorations. Flammable Aerosol. Fabulous glitter effect finish Spray Outdoors in a well ventilated area Dries to a Shimmering Gold Finish For Indoor Decorations only.
